property.value:
local currentAutoChaser = nil local nextAutoChaser = nil
local manualChaser = nil local nextManualChaser = nil local TIMEOUT = 100 local time local soloButtonsClicked = {}
function init() --print('init') currentAutoChaser = nil manualChaser = nil nextAutoChaser = nil nextManualChaser = nil soloButtonsClicked = {} time = getMillis() end
function onReceiveNotify(from,values) nextAutoChaser = nil nextManualChaser = nil print('root receive') if from == 'AutoChaser' then nextAutoChaser = values; sendOSCsChasers() end
if from == 'ManualChaser' then nextManualChaser = values manualOSCSends() end end
function manualOSCSends() print('sendOSCs Start')
if nextManualChaser ~= nil then sendOSC('Chaser'..nextManualChaser,1) end
manualChaser = nextManualChaser
-- print(manualChaser) -- print(nextManualChaser) -- print(autoChaser) -- print(nextAutoChaser) -- local justDisabledManual = false -- if manualChaser ~= nil and nextManualChaser == nil then -- justDisabledManual = true -- if autoChaser == nil then -- print('aaaa') -- sendOSC('Chaser'..manualChaser,-1) -- elseif autoChaser ~= manualChaser then -- print('hhhhh') -- sendOSC('Chaser'..autoChaser,-1) -- end -- elseif not(manualChaser == nil and nextManualChaser == nil) and manualChaser ~= nextManualChaser then -- if autoChaser ~= nil and autoChaser ~= nextManualChaser then -- --print('send nextManualChaser:' ..nextManualChaser) -- sendOSC('Chaser'..nextManualChaser,1) -- elseif autoChaser == nil then -- print('sending' .. nextManualChaser) -- sendOSC('Chaser'..nextManualChaser,1) -- end -- end -- manualChaser = nextManualChaser end
function sendOSCsChasers() print('sendoscchasers') if manualChaser ~= nil then return end
if autoChaser ~= nil and nextAutoChaser == nil then print('send Auto Chaser To Disable:' ..autoChaser) sendOSC('Chaser'..autoChaser,0) --send Auto Chaser To Disable elseif not(autoChaser == nil and nextAutoChaser == nil) then print('send nextAutoChaser:' ..nextAutoChaser) sendOSC('Chaser'..nextAutoChaser,1) --send nextAutoChaser end
autoChaser = nextAutoChaser end
function onReceiveOSC(message, connections) local feedbackManager = root:findByName('FEEDBACK MANAGER',true) feedbackManager:notify('onReceiveOSC',{message = message,connections = connections}) end
function sendSoloButtons() local allButtonGroups = root:findAllByName('SoloButtonGroup',true) local allButtons = {}
for i = 1,#allButtonGroups do for j = 1,#allButtonGroups[i].children do allButtons[#allButtons + 1] = allButtonGroups[i].children[j] end end
for i = 1, #allButtons do local button = allButtons[i] button:notify('callOSC') end
--print(#allButtons) end

value.default: SET AUTOMATIC CHASERS TO PLAY ONE AFTER EACHOTHER WITH A DURATION FADER ON THE LEFT. THE MANUAL OVVERIDE CHASERS WILL OVERIDE THE CURRENT PLAYING CHASER AND WHEN UNCLICKED WILL RESTART THE AUTOMATIC CHASER

property.value:
local TIMEOUT = 10000 local maxTimeout = 20000 local time local activeButtonId local loopIndex local indexOfChaser
function init() time = getMillis() loopIndex = 1 time = TIMEOUT + 1 indexOfChaser = nil resetAllColors() end
function update()
TIMEOUT = root:findByName('Automatic Chaser Speed',true).values.x * maxTimeout if TIMEOUT < 1000 then TIMEOUT = 1000 end
local chasersStart = self.parent.children.StartStopAutoChasers.values.x == 0 if chasersStart == false then resetAllColors() end
if time and getMillis() - time > TIMEOUT and chasersStart == true then calculateActiveChaser() end end
function calculateActiveChaser() resetAllColors() time = getMillis() local foundActiveButton = false local activeButtonValue = nil local noButtonPressed = true; local newIndexOfChaser = nil for i= 1,#self.children do
if loopIndex > #self.children then loopIndex = 1 end --print('loopIndex:'..loopIndex)
local child = self.children[loopIndex]
if child.type == ControlType.BUTTON and child.values.x == 1 then noButtonPressed = false end
if indexOfChaser then if loopIndex == indexOfChaser and foundActiveButton == false then foundActiveButton = true activeButtonValue = child.values.x --print('foundactivebutton') elseif foundActiveButton and child.type == ControlType.BUTTON and child.values.x == 1 then --print('setting new button') newIndexOfChaser = loopIndex break end else --print('hre') if child.type == ControlType.BUTTON and child.values.x == 1 then newIndexOfChaser = loopIndex break end end
loopIndex = loopIndex + 1 end
if foundActiveButton and activeButtonValue == 1 and newIndexOfChaser == nil then newIndexOfChaser = indexOfChaser end
if newIndexOfChaser ~= nil then self.children[newIndexOfChaser].color = Color(0.000000,0.899287,1.000000,1.000000) end
if indexOfChaser ~= newIndexOfChaser then callPlayChaser(newIndexOfChaser) end
indexOfChaser = newIndexOfChaser if indexOfChaser ~= nil then activeButtonId = self.children[indexOfChaser].ID else activeButtonId = nil end --print('end')
end
function resetAllColors() for i = 1,#self.children do if self.children[i].type == ControlType.BUTTON then self.children[i].color = Color(1.000000,0.098123,0.066667,1.000000) end end end
function callPlayChaser(index) root:notify('AutoChaser',index) if index == nil then return end
--print('chaser being called :'..index) end
function onReceiveNotify(id,toggleValue) --print('notifyreceviedauto') --print(id) --print(toggleValue) --print(activeButtonId) if (toggleValue == 0 and activeButtonId == id) or (toggleValue == 1 and activeButtonId == nil) then print('aa') time = 0 calculateActiveChaser() end end
function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'touch' and self.values.touch == false then --print(#root:findByName('buttons',true).children) self.parent:notify(self.ID,self.values.x) end end

function onValueChanged(value) --button only if self.values[value] == true then for i= 1,#self.parent.children do local child = self.parent.children[i] if child.ID ~= self.ID then if child.type == ControlType.BUTTON then child.values.x = 0 end end end end end

function onValueChanged(value) --button only if self.values[value] == true then for i= 1,#self.parent.children do local child = self.parent.children[i] if child.ID ~= self.ID then if child.type == ControlType.BUTTON then child.values.x = 0 end end end end end

function init() for i = 1,#self.children do local child = self.children[i] child.values.x = 0; end end
function onReceiveNotify(key, value) print('notified!') local chaserToSend = nil; for i = 1,#self.children do local child = self.children[i] if child.ID ~= key then if child.values.x == 1 then chaserToSend = i end else if child.values.x == 0 then chaserToSend = nil else chaserToSend = i end break end end
for i = 1,#self.children do local child = self.children[i] if i ~= chaserToSend then child.values.x = 0; end end
sendChaserClicked(chaserToSend) end
function sendChaserClicked(index) --print('sending chaser clicked""'..index) root:notify('ManualChaser',index) end

local vipNumber = 1 local OSCValue function init() OSCValue = 0 self.values.x = 0 -- self.values.x = 0 sendOSC('VIPBooth'..vipNumber,-1) end
local justTouched = false function onValueChanged(eventType) -- print(eventType) -- print(self.values.touch) if eventType == 'x' and self.values.touch == true and justTouched == false then print('hh') justTouched = true sendOSC('VIPBooth'..vipNumber,self.values.x) end
if self.values.touch == false then justTouched = false end end
function onReceiveOSC(message, connections) OSCValue = message[2][1].value print('onReceiveOSC') print(OSCValue) print(self.values.x) if OSCValue > 0 and self.values.x == 0 then self.values.x = 1 --sendOSC('VIPBooth'..vipNumber,1) elseif OSCValue < 1 and self.values.x == 1 then self.values.x = 0 --sendOSC('VIPBooth'..vipNumber,1) end
end
function onReceiveNotify(valueType,value) print('receiveNotify') if valueType == 'callOSC' then print(self.values.x) if self.values.x == 1 then sendOSC('VIPBooth'..vipNumber,1) end end end

function onReceiveNotify(key, value) print(key) print(value) print(value.name) print(value.value) if value ~= nil then sendOSC(value.name,value.value) end end

function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'touch' and self.values.touch == true then local allQLCButtons = root:findAllByProperty('tag','QLCBUTTON',true); for i = 1,#allQLCButtons do local currentButton = allQLCButtons[i] if currentButton.values.x == 1 then currentButton:notify('Color Reset',1) end end end end

local sliderName = 'Color Change Slider Red' local buttonName = 'Speed Button' local touchValue = 1
local touchValue function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'touch' then touchValue = self.values[eventType] end if eventType == 'x' and touchValue == true then local greenFader = root:findByName('Color Picker Green Fader',true) local blueFader = root:findByName('Color Picker Blue Fader',true)
sendUpdate() greenFader:notify('Send Update',nil) blueFader:notify('Send Update',nil)
end end
function onReceiveNotify(key, value) if key == 'Send Update' then sendUpdate() end end
function sendUpdate() local dimmerStopButtons = self.parent:findAllByName(buttonName,true) print(dimmerStopButtons) for i = 1,#dimmerStopButtons do print(dimmerStopButtons[i]) local dimmerButton = dimmerStopButtons[i] dimmerButton.values.x = true end
local masterController = root:findByName('Master Control',true) local allQLCButtons = masterController:findAllByType(ControlType.BUTTON,true) for i = 1,#allQLCButtons do local currentButton = allQLCButtons[i] if currentButton.tag == 'QLCBUTTON' and currentButton.values.x == 1 then currentButton:notify(sliderName,self.values.x * root:findByName('Color Picker Master Dimmer',true).values.x) currentButton.color.r = self.values.x end end end

local sliderName = 'Color Change Slider Blue' local buttonName = 'Speed Button' local touchValue = 1
local touchValue function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'touch' then touchValue = self.values[eventType] end if eventType == 'x' and touchValue == true then local redFader = root:findByName('Color Picker Red Fader',true) local greenFader = root:findByName('Color Picker Green Fader',true)
redFader:notify('Send Update',nil) greenFader:notify('Send Update',nil) sendUpdate() end end
function onReceiveNotify(key, value) if key == 'Send Update' then sendUpdate() end end
function sendUpdate() local dimmerStopButtons = self.parent:findAllByName(buttonName,true) print(dimmerStopButtons) for i = 1,#dimmerStopButtons do print(dimmerStopButtons[i]) local dimmerButton = dimmerStopButtons[i] dimmerButton.values.x = true end
local masterController = root:findByName('Master Control',true) local allQLCButtons = masterController:findAllByType(ControlType.BUTTON,true) for i = 1,#allQLCButtons do local currentButton = allQLCButtons[i] if currentButton.tag == 'QLCBUTTON' and currentButton.values.x == 1 then currentButton:notify(sliderName,self.values.x * root:findByName('Color Picker Master Dimmer',true).values.x) currentButton.color.b = self.values.x end end end

local sliderName = 'Color Change Slider Green' local buttonName = 'Speed Button' local touchValue = 1
local touchValue function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'touch' then touchValue = self.values[eventType] end if eventType == 'x' and touchValue == true then local redFader = root:findByName('Color Picker Red Fader',true) local blueFader = root:findByName('Color Picker Blue Fader',true)
redFader:notify('Send Update',nil) sendUpdate() blueFader:notify('Send Update',nil)
end end
function onReceiveNotify(key, value) if key == 'Send Update' then sendUpdate() end end
function sendUpdate() local dimmerStopButtons = self.parent:findAllByName(buttonName,true) print(dimmerStopButtons) for i = 1,#dimmerStopButtons do print(dimmerStopButtons[i]) local dimmerButton = dimmerStopButtons[i] dimmerButton.values.x = true end
local masterController = root:findByName('Master Control',true) local allQLCButtons = masterController:findAllByType(ControlType.BUTTON,true) for i = 1,#allQLCButtons do local currentButton = allQLCButtons[i] if currentButton.tag == 'QLCBUTTON' and currentButton.values.x == 1 then currentButton:notify(sliderName,self.values.x * root:findByName('Color Picker Master Dimmer',true).values.x) currentButton.color.g = self.values.x end end end

local sliderName = 'Dimmer Slider' local buttonName = 'Color Picker Master Dimmer Reset'
function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'touch' then touchValue = self.values.x end
if eventType == 'x' and self.values.touch == true then local redFader = root:findByName('Color Picker Red Fader',true) local greenFader = root:findByName('Color Picker Green Fader',true) local blueFader = root:findByName('Color Picker Blue Fader',true)
redFader:notify('Send Update',nil) greenFader:notify('Send Update',nil) blueFader:notify('Send Update',nil)
sendUpdate() end end
function sendUpdate() local dimmerStopButtons = self.parent:findAllByName(buttonName,true) print(dimmerStopButtons) for i = 1,#dimmerStopButtons do print(dimmerStopButtons[i]) local dimmerButton = dimmerStopButtons[i] dimmerButton.values.x = true end
local masterController = root:findByName('Master Control',true) local allQLCButtons = masterController:findAllByType(ControlType.BUTTON,true) for i = 1,#allQLCButtons do local currentButton = allQLCButtons[i] if currentButton.tag == 'QLCBUTTON' and currentButton.values.x == 1 then currentButton:notify(sliderName,self.values.x) end end end

function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'touch' and self.values.touch == true then local colorPickerMasterDimmer = root:findByName('Color Picker Master Dimmer',true) colorPickerMasterDimmer.values.x = 1 local allQLCButtons = root:findAllByProperty('tag','QLCBUTTON',true); for i = 1,#allQLCButtons do local currentButton = allQLCButtons[i] if currentButton.values.x == 1 then currentButton:notify('Slider Dimmer Reset',1) end end end end

local sliderName = 'Strobe Update' local buttonName = 'Color Picker Master Strobe Reset'
function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'touch' then touchValue = self.values.x end
if eventType == 'x' and self.values.touch == true then sendUpdate() end end
function sendUpdate() local dimmerStopButtons = self.parent:findAllByName(buttonName,true) for i = 1,#dimmerStopButtons do print(dimmerStopButtons[i]) local dimmerButton = dimmerStopButtons[i] dimmerButton.values.x = true end
local masterController = root:findByName('Master Control',true) local allQLCButtons = masterController:findAllByType(ControlType.BUTTON,true) for i = 1,#allQLCButtons do local currentButton = allQLCButtons[i] if currentButton.tag == 'QLCBUTTON' and currentButton.values.x == 1 then currentButton:notify(sliderName,self.values.x) end end end

function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'touch' and self.values.touch == true then local allQLCButtons = root:findAllByProperty('tag','QLCBUTTON',true); local colorPickerMasterDimmer = root:findByName('Color Picker Master Strobe',true) colorPickerMasterDimmer.values.x = 0 for i = 1,#allQLCButtons do local currentButton = allQLCButtons[i] if currentButton.values.x == 1 then currentButton:notify('Slider Strobe Reset',1) end end end end

function init() root:findByName('FEEDBACK MANAGER',true):notify('feedback',{caller = 'testt',Id = self.ID}) end
function onReceiveNotify(from,value) if(from == 'feedback') then self.values.x = value end end

function onReceiveNotify(key,input) local allMacroButtons = self:findAllByName('Macro Button') local allMacroButtonLabel = self:findAllByName('Macro Button Label')
local bottomPages = root:findByProperty('tag','Master Controller Bottom Pages',true) bottomPages.values.page = 1 local macroPickerLabel = self:findByProperty('tag','Light Setup Name Label',true) macroPickerLabel.values.text = input.lightName
for i = 1,#allMacroButtons do local macroButton = allMacroButtons[i] macroButton.frame.h = 100 macroButton.frame.w = 100 macroButton.frame.x = macroButton.frame.w * ((i-1) % 5) + 70 macroButton.frame.y = macroButton.frame.h * (math.floor((i-1)/5)) + 30 macroButton.tag = '' if #input.macros > i - 1 then macroButton.visible = true macroButton.tag = input.lightName .. ' Macro ' ..input.macros[i].name else macroButton.visible = false end end
for i = 1,#allMacroButtonLabel do local macroButtonLabel = allMacroButtonLabel[i] macroButtonLabel.frame.h = 100 macroButtonLabel.frame.w = 100 macroButtonLabel.frame.x = macroButtonLabel.frame.w * ((i-1) % 5) + 70 macroButtonLabel.frame.y = macroButtonLabel.frame.h * (math.floor((i-1)/5)) + 30 macroButtonLabel.values.text = '' macroButtonLabel.background = false if #input.macros > i - 1 then macroButtonLabel.visible = true macroButtonLabel.values.text = input.macros[i].name else macroButtonLabel.visible = false end end end

function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'touch' and self.values[eventType] == true then local masterControl = root:findByName('Master Control',true) masterControl:notify(self.tag,{name = self.tag,value = 1}) end end

local lastColorChangeKey = ''
function onReceiveNotify(key, value) local masterControl = root:findByName('Master Control',true) local pair = {} pair.value = value; if key == 'Color Change Button' then pair.name = self.parent.tag .. ' ' .. key .. ' ' .. value; if lastColorChangeKey ~= value then pair.value = 1 masterControl:notify(key,pair) lastColorChangeKey = value end
else pair.name = self.parent.tag .. ' ' .. key; masterControl:notify(key,pair) end end
function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'x' then local onoffbutton = self.parent:findByType(ControlType.BOX) if self.values.x == 1 then onoffbutton.color = Color(0,1,0,1) else onoffbutton.color = Color(1,0,0) end end end

local lastColorChangeKey = '' local reverse = true
local isTouched = false function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'x' and self.values.touch == true and isTouched == false then isTouched = true setButtonSettings() sendOnOff() end
if self.values.touch == false then isTouched = false end end
function sendOnOff() local fixtureMain = self.parent.parent:findByProperty('tag','QLCBUTTON',true); if self.values.x == 1 then fixtureMain:notify(self.tag,0) else fixtureMain:notify(self.tag,1) end
end
local initFeedback = false; function init() self.values.x = 1 setButtonSettings()
local fixtureMain = self.parent.parent:findByProperty('tag','QLCBUTTON',true); root:findByName('FEEDBACK MANAGER',true):notify('feedback',{caller = fixtureMain.parent.tag .. ' ' .. self.tag,Id = self.ID}) initFeedback = true end
function onReceiveNotify(from,value) if(from == 'feedback') then if(initFeedback == false) then return end
initFeedback = false
self.values.x = value if reverse == true then if value == 1 then self.values.x = 0 else self.values.x = 1 end end setButtonSettings() end end
function setButtonSettings() local onoffbuttonText = self.parent:findByType(ControlType.TEXT) if self.values.x == 1 then onoffbuttonText.values.text = 'ON' self.color = Color(0,1,0,1) else onoffbuttonText.values.text = 'OFF' self.color = Color(1,0,0) end end

' ' .. key .. ' ' .. value; if lastColorChangeKey ~= value then pair.value = 1 masterControl:notify(key,pair) lastColorChangeKey = value end
else pair.name = self.parent.tag .. ' ' .. key; masterControl:notify(key,pair) end end
function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'x' then local onoffbutton = self.parent:findByType(ControlType.BOX) if self.values.x == 1 then onoffbutton.color = Color(0,1,0,1) else onoffbutton.color = Color(1,0,0) end end end

local lastColorChangeKey = '' local reverse = true
local isTouched = false function onValueChanged(eventType) if eventType == 'x' and self.values.touch == true and isTouched == false then isTouched = true setButtonSettings() sendOnOff() end
if self.values.touch == false then isTouched = false end end
function sendOnOff() local fixtureMain = self.parent.parent:findByProperty('tag','QLCBUTTON',true); if self.values.x == 1 then fixtureMain:notify(self.tag,0) else fixtureMain:notify(self.tag,1) end
end
local initFeedback = false; function init() self.values.x = 1 setButtonSettings()
local fixtureMain = self.parent.parent:findByProperty('tag','QLCBUTTON',true); root:findByName('FEEDBACK MANAGER',true):notify('feedback',{caller = fixtureMain.parent.tag .. ' ' .. self.tag,Id = self.ID}) initFeedback = true end
function onReceiveNotify(from,value) if(from == 'feedback') then if(initFeedback == false) then return end
initFeedback = false
self.values.x = value if reverse == true then if value == 1 then self.values.x = 0 else self.values.x = 1 end end setButtonSettings() end end
function setButtonSettings() local onoffbuttonText = self.parent:findByType(ControlType.TEXT) if self.values.x == 1 then onoffbuttonText.values.text = 'ON' self.color = Color(0,1,0,1) else onoffbuttonText.values.text = 'OFF' self.color = Color(1,0,0) end end

local feedbackWaitMap = {}
function onReceiveNotify(from,values) if(from == 'onReceiveOSC') then onReceiveOSC(values.message,values.connections) end if(from == 'feedback') then print('asking for feedback') feedbackWaitMap[values.caller] = values.Id; sendOSC(values.caller,-1) end
end
-- example function onReceiveOSC(message, connections) print('onReceiveOSC') local path = message[1] local arguments = message[2] print('\t path =', path) for i=1,#arguments do print('\t argument =', arguments[i].tag, arguments[i].value) end print('\t connections =', table.unpack(connections))
if feedbackWaitMap[path] ~= nil then print('feedback returned!!') local caller = root:findByID(feedbackWaitMap[path],true) if caller ~= nil then caller:notify('feedback',arguments[1].value) end end end
